title: BTA Better Flags
description: Adds QOL features to the flag editor
body:
_This mod uses a modified version of Fabric (Babric) and is designed only for Better than Adventure, a heavily modified version of Minecraft b1.7.3! For more information, join the discord server provided on this projects page._

![Sidebar with options to offset, flip, clear, copy and paste the flag. And a preview of the flag in inventory.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed9769aade94978594cfc4c06ec3930d1b0bd7aa.png)

Adds a few quality-of-life features to the flag editor in Better Than Adventure.

Current features:
- Offset the entire flag, pixel by pixel
- Flip vertically and horizontally
- Clear the entire flag
- Copy and paste the entire design to your clipboard
